value_chain_position: Designs and sells spine surgery implants and the ExcelsiusGPS robotic navigation platform; earns per-procedure implant revenue with robotic capital equipment driving consumable pull-through.
relative_comps: Globus Medical is the fastest-growing large-cap spine company, benefiting from the NuVasive merger creating the largest pure-play spine platform. ExcelsiusGPS is a proven robotic-navigation system taking share from Medtronic's Mazor and Stryker's Spine in enabling procedures. Revenue CAGR of 42% is heavily influenced by the NuVasive acquisition, but organic growth is also above peers. FCF margin of 20% on a merged entity is impressive. Against Alphatec and ZimVie, GMED commands scale and robot-enabled pull-through advantages. The robotics_automation tag is legitimate — GMED earns a recurring implant royalty on every robotic-placed procedure.
